description_long: This arcade game cabinet is a classic upright model with a black exterior accented by green trim. The front features a control panel with a red joystick and several colored buttons, set below a large, slightly curved display screen. The marquee at the top displays the 'Galaga' logo in stylized green and white lettering, matching the side panel branding. Both side panels are decorated with vibrant, retro-themed artwork featuring a space battle motif, including a central spaceship and colorful rays radiating outward. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood or MDF, with plastic and metal components for the controls and trim. The overall design is robust and visually striking, evoking the golden age of arcade gaming.
description: A classic upright 'Galaga' arcade game cabinet with black and green trim, vibrant side artwork, and a retro control panel featuring a joystick and buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with joystick and buttons, the display screen, and the 'Galaga' marquee at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the colorful space-themed artwork and the profile of the control panel and marquee.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back panel with green trim and no visible artwork or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with identical vibrant artwork and the cabinet's profile.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one red joystick on the left and three colored buttons to the right, set on a light blue panel with game-themed markings
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Galaga' logo in green and white with decorative flourishes on a black background, matching the game's retro space theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display vibrant, retro artwork with a central spaceship, colorful rays, and the 'Galaga' logo, all in a dynamic, space-themed style
